name: Alex Johnson
bio: Met in university during freshman year. We used to go hiking every weekend. Alex is one of the most genuine people I know — always honest and supportive no matter what.

name: Sarah Ahmed
bio: Sarah was my first manager at my previous job. She taught me how to communicate effectively and manage deadlines. We still catch up regularly and she gives great career advice.

name: Mike Torres
bio: Mike and I grew up on the same street. We went to the same school from grade 1 all the way through high school. He moved to another city for college but we try to stay in touch.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Priya is like a sister to me. We met in college and instantly connected over our love for cooking and old Bollywood movies. She now works as a doctor and inspires me every day.

name: James Lee
bio: James and I worked together at a startup for two years. He is an incredible full-stack developer and taught me a lot about system design. We often exchange ideas about side projects.

name: Nadia Rahman
bio: Nadia and I were roommates for two years in university. We survived exams, late-night study sessions, and terrible cafeteria food together. She is one of the kindest people I have ever met.

name: Carlos Mendez
bio: Carlos is my gym buddy. We started training together two years ago and have been pushing each other ever since. Outside the gym, he is great at giving perspective when I am overthinking things.

name: Emma Wilson
bio: Emma and I met through a mutual friend at a book club meetup. We discovered we have almost identical taste in literature and have been recommending books to each other every month since.

name: David Kim
bio: David and I connected at a travel meetup two years ago. We have been to three countries together. Despite living in different cities now, we still plan trips and send each other travel tips.

name: Lisa Nakamura
bio: Lisa is a graphic designer I met at a local art workshop. She has an incredible eye for detail and has helped me with creative projects multiple times. We meet up for coffee and sketch sessions.
